section: Schedule A - Assets and "Unearned Income" — attachment "MS M R Schedule A 12.31.16"

rows.asset_name: Hamlin High Div Equity Inst (Ticker: HHDFX)

free_text: Transposed Morgan Stanley-prepared attachment grid (footer: "MS M R Schedule A 12.31.16"), second page of this attachment. Each column is one asset; rows are EIF (checkmark for Vanguard Dividend Growth Fund and Hamlin High Div Equity Inst; blank for Solarcity), SP/DC/JT ("SP" for all three), Stock Name, Ticker, then Value of Asset buckets, Type of Income rows, Amount of Income: Current Year buckets, and Amount of Income: Preceding Year (January 1, 2016 - December 31, 2016) buckets. Selections are solid-black filled cells. All three assets have Value of Asset "A: None" (single black bar spans all three columns) and Amount of Income: Current Year "A: None" (single black bar spans all three columns). "Page ___ of ___" left blank. Name: Rohit Khanna.
